relations.note: Content blocks are assembled into alternating-background sections.

quotes: direct attention to the single most important element
Generous white space; clean, never cluttered.
**Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

rules.intent: Keep layouts uncluttered and focused so each section reads clearly.
rules.rule_text: Use generous white space — clean, never cluttered. Limit focal points per section and use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

quotes: "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

rules.intent: Improve readability and engagement by favoring visuals over dense text.
rules.rule_text: "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

quotes: so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge
Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.
**[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**

rules.intent: Prevent adjacent assembled sections from visually merging by alternating backgrounds and declaring them in metadata.
rules.rule_text: Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern): alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. [GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern
Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern
reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials

rules.intent: Standardize content blocks on the patient-brochure reference pattern.
rules.rule_text: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern, per the patient brochure, which is the reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials.
